archive_data.question_text: In which of the following cities of British India was the Communist Party of India founded, in 1925?

explanation.english: The Communist Party of India was founded in Kanpur in 1925. It was established by revolutionaries including MN Roy.
explanation.tanglish: Communist Party of India 1925-aam aandu Kanpur nagarathil sthapikkappattadhu. Idhu MN Roy poondu irundha punalthuli koottam moolamaaga sthapikkappattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following won the '67th Filmfare Award 2022 for Best Choreography' for the film Atrangi Re?

explanation.english: Vijay Ganguly won the 67th Filmfare Award 2022 for Best Choreography for the film Atrangi Re, specifically for the song 'Chaka Chak'.
explanation.tanglish: Vijay Ganguly Atrangi Re padathirkaga 67-aam Filmfare Award 2022 Best Choreographyaward vanginaar. Migavum 'Chaka Chak' paattukaga thaan avargal inayattam seithu award vanginaar.

archive_data.question_text: During the census 2011, which of the following states recorded the lowest growth rate?

explanation.english: Nagaland recorded the lowest population growth rate during the 2011 Census, with a negative growth rate of -0.58%.
explanation.tanglish: 2011 Census-il Nagaland maanilathu matrulla maanilangalai vida adhigam negative growth rate (-0.58%) edam petru Indiaavil kammi saagasa vilaadchaalaiyai (lowest growth rate) eduthu kanbithadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements is correct with regard to the effect of globalisation on India and other developing countries?

options.text: Flow of information became highly restricted.
It led to increased inequality between countries.
Flow of international capital got restricted.

explanation.english: Globalisation has led to increased inequality between countries, as developed nations benefit more from global trade compared to developing nations.
explanation.tanglish: Globalisation naadugal idaiyil aniyaayathai (inequality) perukkum. Valarndha naadugal ulaga viyabaarathil irundhu adhigam payan petrudan, valarum naadugal adhigam labikkavadhillai.

archive_data.question_text: According to the Planning Commission of India (2011-12), which state has the highest percentage of the population below the poverty line?

explanation.english: According to the Planning Commission of India (2011-12), Chhattisgarh had the highest percentage of population below the poverty line at 39.93%.
explanation.tanglish: India Planning Commission 2011-12 anumaanithathu prakaaram, Chhattisgarh maanilathil 39.93% perithanam jaanavarigal poverty line keel irukkiraar. Idhu Indiaavil adhigam aagum.

archive_data.question_text: Guru Amubi Singh won the Sangeet Natak Akademi Award for which form of dance?

explanation.english: Guru Amubi Singh is a renowned Manipuri dancer who won the Sangeet Natak Akademi Award for his contributions to Manipuri dance.
explanation.tanglish: Guru Amubi Singh prasiddhaana Manipuri nirtha kalagaraar. Avargal Manipuri nirthathukku seitha sevaiykalukaga Sangeet Natak Akademi Award vanginaar.

archive_data.question_text: The Teliaya Dam is located in which state of India?

explanation.english: Teliaya Dam (also spelled Tilaiya Dam) is located in Jharkhand on the Barakar River. It is one of the first dams built under the Damodar Valley Corporation.
explanation.tanglish: Teliaya Dam (Tilaiya Dam) Jharkhand maanilathil Barakar aatril amaikkappattulladhu. Idhu Damodar Valley Corporation kizha kattappatta muthal anaiyagalil ondru.
